interests.description: Broadly interested in AI systems, LLMs, generative models, and AI-driven applications.
Building applications that leverage generative AI models for content creation, assistance, and automation.
Designing RAG pipelines that combine vector search with LLM generation for accurate, context-aware AI systems.
Building autonomous agents that can reason, plan, and execute multi-step tasks with tool use.
Using data to drive decisions through analysis, visualization, and statistical modeling.
Exploring ML algorithms, model training, and deploying intelligent systems.
Designing scalable, reliable, and maintainable software architectures.
Building robust backend systems with clean APIs, efficient databases, and strong architecture.
Contributing to and building open-source projects that benefit the developer community.
Explored quantum computing concepts while building Xrepo, interested in the intersection of quantum and AI.
